title: [codereview-2] pass 1: T-Deck gateway conf update - stack/TC_TX/epoch/RX1 added with comments
description: Review of edit to lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.conf: added full NVS/SETTINGS deps for LINK_EPOCH_PERSIST and detailed comments copied from Heltec. No correctness issues found in this pass. Verified configs now match requirements for avoiding deadlock and replay coinflip.
